parameters.query: {{ (() => { const pid = String($('Webhook').first().json.body.property_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); const name = String($('Webhook').first().json.body.display_name || pid).replace(/,/g, '').replace(/'/g, "''"); if (!pid) return 'SELECT 1'; return `INSERT INTO ga_properties (property_id, display_name, last_synced) VALUES ('${pid}', '${name}', NOW()) ON CONFLICT (property_id) DO UPDATE SET display_name = CASE WHEN EXCLUDED.display_name = '' THEN ga_properties.display_name ELSE EXCLUDED.display_name END, last_synced = NOW()`; })() }}

={{ (() => { const pid=String($json.property_id||'').replace(/'/g,"''"); const dt=String($json.report_date||''); const ses=Number($json.sessions)||0; const tu=Number($json.total_users)||0; const nu=Number($json.new_users)||0; const spv=Number($json.screen_page_views)||0; const br=Number($json.bounce_rate)||0; const asd=Number($json.avg_session_duration)||0; const er=Number($json.engagement_rate)||0; const egs=Number($json.engaged_sessions)||0; const ca=String($json.collected_at||'').replace(/'/g,"''"); return `INSERT INTO ga_daily_overview (property_id,report_date,sessions,total_users,new_users,screen_page_views,bounce_rate,avg_session_duration,engagement_rate,engaged_sessions,collected_at) VALUES ('${pid}','${dt}'::date,${ses}::integer,${tu}::integer,${nu}::integer,${spv}::integer,${br}::numeric,${asd}::numeric,${er}::numeric,${egs}::integer,'${ca}'::timestamptz) ON CONFLICT (property_id,report_date) DO UPDATE SET sessions=EXCLUDED.sessions,total_users=EXCLUDED.total_users,new_users=EXCLUDED.new_users,screen_page_views=EXCLUDED.screen_page_views,bounce_rate=EXCLUDED.bounce_rate,avg_session_duration=EXCLUDED.avg_session_duration,engagement_rate=EXCLUDED.engagement_rate,engaged_sessions=EXCLUDED.engaged_sessions,collected_at=EXCLUDED.collected_at`; })() }}

={{ (() => { const pid=String($json.property_id||'').replace(/'/g,"''"); const dt=String($json.report_date||''); const tr=Number($json.total_revenue)||0; const txn=Number($json.transactions)||0; const apr=Number($json.avg_purchase_revenue)||0; const scr=Number($json.session_conversion_rate)||0; const pvr=Number($json.purchase_to_view_rate)||0; const ca=String($json.collected_at||'').replace(/'/g,"''"); return `INSERT INTO ga_ecommerce (property_id,report_date,total_revenue,transactions,avg_purchase_revenue,session_conversion_rate,purchase_to_view_rate,collected_at) VALUES ('${pid}','${dt}'::date,${tr}::numeric,${txn}::integer,${apr}::numeric,${scr}::numeric,${pvr}::numeric,'${ca}'::timestamptz) ON CONFLICT (property_id,report_date) DO UPDATE SET total_revenue=EXCLUDED.total_revenue,transactions=EXCLUDED.transactions,avg_purchase_revenue=EXCLUDED.avg_purchase_revenue,session_conversion_rate=EXCLUDED.session_conversion_rate,purchase_to_view_rate=EXCLUDED.purchase_to_view_rate,collected_at=EXCLUDED.collected_at`; })() }}

={{ (() => { const pid=String($json.property_id||'').replace(/'/g,"''"); const dt=String($json.report_date||''); const cg=String($json.channel_group||'').replace(/'/g,"''"); const sm=String($json.source_medium||'').replace(/'/g,"''"); const ses=Number($json.sessions)||0; const br=Number($json.bounce_rate)||0; const er=Number($json.engagement_rate)||0; const ca=String($json.collected_at||'').replace(/'/g,"''"); return `INSERT INTO ga_traffic_sources (property_id,report_date,channel_group,source_medium,sessions,bounce_rate,engagement_rate,collected_at) VALUES ('${pid}','${dt}'::date,'${cg}','${sm}',${ses}::integer,${br}::numeric,${er}::numeric,'${ca}'::timestamptz) ON CONFLICT (property_id,report_date,channel_group,source_medium) DO UPDATE SET sessions=EXCLUDED.sessions,bounce_rate=EXCLUDED.bounce_rate,engagement_rate=EXCLUDED.engagement_rate,collected_at=EXCLUDED.collected_at`; })() }}

={{ (() => { const pid=String($json.property_id||'').replace(/'/g,"''"); const dt=String($json.report_date||''); const pp=String($json.page_path||'').replace(/'/g,"''"); const pt=String($json.page_title||'').replace(/'/g,"''"); const spv=Number($json.screen_page_views)||0; const asd=Number($json.avg_session_duration)||0; const br=Number($json.bounce_rate)||0; const er=Number($json.engagement_rate)||0; const ca=String($json.collected_at||'').replace(/'/g,"''"); return `INSERT INTO ga_top_pages (property_id,report_date,page_path,page_title,screen_page_views,avg_session_duration,bounce_rate,engagement_rate,collected_at) VALUES ('${pid}','${dt}'::date,'${pp}','${pt}',${spv}::integer,${asd}::numeric,${br}::numeric,${er}::numeric,'${ca}'::timestamptz) ON CONFLICT (property_id,report_date,page_path) DO UPDATE SET page_title=EXCLUDED.page_title,screen_page_views=EXCLUDED.screen_page_views,avg_session_duration=EXCLUDED.avg_session_duration,bounce_rate=EXCLUDED.bounce_rate,engagement_rate=EXCLUDED.engagement_rate,collected_at=EXCLUDED.collected_at`; })() }}

={{ (() => { const pid=String($json.property_id||'').replace(/'/g,"''"); const dt=String($json.report_date||''); const dev=String($json.device_category||'').replace(/'/g,"''"); const cnt=String($json.country||'').replace(/'/g,"''"); const ses=Number($json.sessions)||0; const tu=Number($json.total_users)||0; const ca=String($json.collected_at||'').replace(/'/g,"''"); return `INSERT INTO ga_device_geo (property_id,report_date,device_category,country,sessions,total_users,collected_at) VALUES ('${pid}','${dt}'::date,'${dev}','${cnt}',${ses}::integer,${tu}::integer,'${ca}'::timestamptz) ON CONFLICT (property_id,report_date,device_category,country) DO UPDATE SET sessions=EXCLUDED.sessions,total_users=EXCLUDED.total_users,collected_at=EXCLUDED.collected_at`; })() }}
={{ (() => {   const pid = String($('Webhook').first().json.body.property_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''");   return `INSERT INTO refresh_log (property_id, status) VALUES ('${pid}', 'done')`; })() }}
